provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly environment concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi space station interior, visible surface texture and lived-in detail, visible brushstrokes, wide establishing view, no characters present, regulation habitation corridor with numbered apartment doors, steel blue walls with floor numbering, overhead fluorescent strips, fire suppression equipment at intervals, community notice board with posted regulations, small window at corridor end showing stars, identical doors stretching into distance, submarine crew quarters scaled up
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine, luxury, Star Trek promenade, people, characters, figures, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, exterior space view

judgment.explanation: Station/port environment with gritty atmosphere, faction presence, and lived-in texture.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Not generic sci-fi — reads as faction-specific and lived-in
